texto: A lot of churches and church people give God a bad name. There's a scripture in the Bible that says the traditions of men make the word of God of none effect. That's so true. All our religious rituals dilute the reality of who God is and make a lot of people not want to have anything to do with Him. I had to learn to reject 'Churchianity' and not Christianity.
explicacao: Citação de Sherri L. Lewis sobre temas ligados a motivacao. “A lot of churches and church people give God a bad name.
